title: Avasis | Siemens
body: Avasis The avasis group is a Platinum Partner of Siemens in the DACH region and specializes in the sales and implementation of the Siemens software solutions Teamcenter, Polarion, NX, and Teamcenter Quality. As a powerful addition to the Siemens product portfolio, we develop our own software products and sell/ implement them worldwide. Industries IT and telecommunication Pharma and life science Healthcare Others Motion Build Extends or builds on a Siemens Xcelerator product / solution by creating a new product, or creates a new customer solution via integration of Siemens Xcelerator product and own product Sell Resell / Co-sell SW and digital enabled HW on Siemens Xcelerator Service Provides a service for a Siemens Xcelerator product/solution that helps the customer to implement, integrate, operate or maintain it Available Products Teamcenter Medical Device Solution The Teamcenter Medical Device Solution (TC MDS) is an industry-specific enhancement to the powerful Siemens PLM software “Teamcenter”. Learn more avaRIMx avaRIMx is a regulatory information management system RIMS by avasis that centralizes and streamlines regulatory data processes and strategies across the entire product lifecycle helping organizations manage compliance submissions...
